## Tags
loop, arrows, recurring, again

## Categories
arrows, multimedia

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/repeat-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::RepeatOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        RepeatOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
